rationale: Keep because the two notes indicate strong methodological and conceptual overlap: both model physician prescription choice under quality uncertainty with Bayesian learning and detailing signals in prescription-drug markets. The cited 2005 paper contributes a structural learning framework (indirect learning vs. direct goodwill over time) that could plausibly serve as a mechanism/method source for the 2009 spillover model. With an exact DOI match and no evidence this is merely a perfunctory background mention, it is not safe to drop.
